ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in the European Union */,
  "fr_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in France */,
  "it_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in Italy */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in the United Kingdom */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in the United States */,
  "au_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in Australia */,
  "jp_size" INTEGER /* Size equivalent in Japan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the size standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., European Union) */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country within the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's central point */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language(s) spoken in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "demand_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of demand for this size in the region */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Inventory level for this size in the region */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of units sold for the size in the region */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the size in the region */,
  "customer_satisfaction" REAL /* Average customer satisfaction score for the size in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, inventory specialist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard being accessed */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
